description: Expression with alias infers correct type from the function return type
name: expression_alias
query_sql:
-- @name ListUpperNames
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, UPPER(name) AS upper_name FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
